Name: BetterShopAuctionModernPack
Description: Modern UI override pack for BetterShopAuction. Adds custom flat-design textures (containers, buttons, separators) and the .ui files referencing them. When installed alongside the main BetterShopAuction plugin, this pack overrides the vanilla game-asset look with a modern dark/cyan theme. Remove this plugin to fall back to vanilla styling.
